description: Kneel and roll the wheel forward, extending your body, then pull back using your core.
name: Ab Wheel Rollout

description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, squat down until thighs are parallel, then stand up.
name: Bodyweight Squats

description: Hang with an underhand grip and pull your chin above the bar.
name: Chin-ups

description: Grip parallel bars, lower your body until your upper arms are parallel, then press up.
name: Dips

description: Lie on your back with knees bent and drive your hips up by squeezing your glutes.
name: Glute Bridge

description: Hang from a bar and raise your legs until they are parallel to the ground or higher.
name: Hanging Leg Raise

description: Hang beneath a bar set at waist height and pull your chest up to the bar.
name: Inverted Row

description: Start in a push-up position with hips raised high and press your head towards the floor.
name: Pike Push-ups

description: Hang with an overhand grip and pull your chin above the bar.
name: Pull-ups

description: Place your hands shoulder-width apart on the floor, lower your chest down, then push back up.
name: Push-ups

description: Lie on your side propped on your forearm, keeping your body in a straight line.
name: Side Plank

description: Lie on your back with knees bent and curl your torso up off the floor.
name: Sit-ups

description: Stand with feet hip-width apart, raise up onto the balls of your feet, then lower slowly.
name: Bodyweight Calf Raises

description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, squat to parallel, then explode upward. Land softly with bent knees and go straight into the next rep.
name: Squat Jumps

description: From standing, drop your hands to the floor, jump your feet back to a plank, perform a push-up, jump your feet in and explosively stand. Keep the movement fluid.
name: Burpees

description: Perform a burpee but at the jump phase drive forward off both feet, landing as far ahead as possible with soft knees.
name: Burpee Broad Jumps

description: Stand in front of a box, hinge slightly and explode upward, landing softly on top with both feet. Step down and reset.
name: Box Jumps/Step-ups

description: Hold a wall ball at chest height, squat to depth, then drive up and throw the ball to a target on the wall. Catch and go straight into the next rep.
name: Wall Balls

description: Hold a slam ball overhead, brace your core and slam it into the ground as hard as possible. Pick it up and repeat.
name: Ball Slams

description: Perform a bicycle crunch by lying on your back, hands behind your head, and rotating your elbow to the opposite knee in a slow, controlled movement.
name: Bicycle Crunch

description: Step back into a reverse lunge, lowering your back knee to just above the floor. Drive through the front heel to return. Alternate sides.
name: Reverse Lunge

description: From a glute bridge position, march alternate feet off the floor keeping hips level and maintaining constant glute tension.
name: Glute Bridge March

description: Stand with your back against a wall, slide down until your thighs are parallel to the floor and hold the position.
name: Wall Sit

description: Stand tall, hinge at the hips and walk your hands out to a plank position. Pause, then walk your hands back and stand. Keep legs as straight as possible throughout.
name: Inchworm
